PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('function')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('apache::bool2http')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
          PsiElement(()('(')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Variant')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Boolean')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiErrorElement:'+=', ',', '-=' or '=' expected, got '$'
            PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('arg')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(>>)('>>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(CASE)('case')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('arg')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
            PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
              PsiPuppetExpressionFalseImpl(EXPRESSION_FALSE)
                PsiElement(FALSE)('false')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetExpressionUndefImpl(EXPRESSION_UNDEF)
                PsiElement(UNDEF)('undef')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                PsiElement(REGEX)('/(?i:false)/')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Off'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
            PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
              PsiPuppetExpressionTrueImpl(EXPRESSION_TRUE)
                PsiElement(TRUE)('true')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                PsiElement(REGEX)('/(?i:true)/')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''On'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
            PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
              PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('arg')
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiErrorElement:'=>' expected, got '}'
        <empty list>
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiElement(})('}')
